allow: Bash(python3 -c "from PIL import Image; img = Image.open\('c:/Users/g/drmohamedkaram/public/portrait.png'\); print\(img.size, img.mode\)")
Bash(Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, WorkingSet64, StartTime)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='CPU';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($total = \(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property WorkingSet64 -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; $count = \(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Write-Output "Node processes: $count | Total RAM used: $\([math]::Round\($total,0\)\) MB")

PowerShell($folders = @\(".next", "node_modules", "drmohamedkaram", "app", "public", ".claude"\); foreach \($f in $folders\) { $path = "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\$f"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; Write-Output "$f : $\([math]::Round\($size,1\)\) MB" } })

PowerShell($nextSize = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\.next" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; $nestedNextSize = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\drmohamedkaram\\.next" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; $nestedGitSize = \(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\drmohamedkaram\\.git" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; Write-Output "Main .next: $\([math]::Round\($nextSize,1\)\) MB"; Write-Output "Nested drmohamedkaram/.next: $\([math]::Round\($nestedNextSize,1\)\) MB"; Write-Output "Nested drmohamedkaram/.git: $\([math]::Round\($nestedGitSize,1\)\) MB")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny"; Start-Process -FilePath "powershell.exe" -ArgumentList "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny'; npm run dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath 'C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\.dev-server.log'" -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "Dev server started in background")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) - OK" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny" -Force | Where-Object {$_.Name -ne '.git'} | Select-Object Name, Attributes, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($folders = @\("node_modules", "app", "public", ".claude", ".next"\); foreach \($f in $folders\) { $path = "C:\\Users\\g\\drhosamhosny\\$f"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; Write-Output "$f : $\([math]::Round\($size,1\)\) MB" } else { Write-Output "$f : not present" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — OK" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
